'''Diplomatic Services''' was a branch of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Bureau of Operations/Legends|Bureau of Operations]]. A catch-all branch, it provided personnel for trade and diplomatic missions assigned to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]], and advisory and political experts for governments and [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]]. Most personnel performed only their assigned duty, although some were covert agents with goals to target [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents in their jurisdiction, or to establish and organize [[system cell]]s.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref>
